summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for Bhubezi taxi app bug fixes. All 16 requested features/bugs were tested and verified. The app is fully functional with all reported bugs fixed.
passed_tests: 1. Onboarding page shows 'SA'S #1 TAXI NETWORK' slogan correctly - VERIFIED
2. Back buttons present on onboarding steps 2, 3, 4, 5 (not step 1 or 6) - VERIFIED
3. Passenger role: onboarding flow completes successfully with name, age, gender, selfie - VERIFIED
4. Passenger dashboard loads with map, comms button, referral section - VERIFIED
5. Passenger comms button opens fixed overlay with DRIVERS/MARSHALS/PASSENGERS channel tabs - VERIFIED
6. Driver role: onboarding flow completes with vehicle info - VERIFIED
7. Driver dashboard loads with comms button that opens proper fixed overlay - VERIFIED
8. Driver comms overlay has DRIVERS/MARSHALS/PASSENGERS channel tabs - VERIFIED
9. Marshal role: onboarding flow completes - VERIFIED
10. Marshal dashboard loads with map, comms button, referral rewards section - VERIFIED
11. Marshal comms overlay opens above map with solid background - VERIFIED
12. Comms message segregation: sending message in one channel does NOT appear in other channels - VERIFIED
13. Referral section: Twitter, WhatsApp, Facebook, Instagram buttons all visible with data-testids - VERIFIED
14. Copy invite link button has data-testid 'copy-invite-link-btn' and shows 'COPIED!' feedback - VERIFIED
15. Voice note button exists in Tavern tab with data-testid 'voice-note-btn' - VERIFIED
16. Tavern tab shows social feed with post creation form - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: filteredMessages logic in all dashboards correctly filters by m.channel === chatChannel only
Driver and Marshal comms overlays use fixed positioning with proper z-index
ReferralRewards component has proper data-testids on all share buttons
OnboardingFlow has back buttons on steps 2-5 correctly implemented
seed_data_creation: N/A - App uses mock data in React state
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 16 reported bugs have been fixed and verified. The app is a frontend-only React application with mock data. Key data-testids: passenger-comms-btn, driver-comms-btn, marshal-comms-btn, share-twitter-btn, share-whatsapp-btn, share-facebook-btn, share-instagram-btn, copy-invite-link-btn, voice-note-btn, signup-name-input, signup-age-input, signup-gender-select, signup-next-btn

tested_features_details.slogan: SA'S #1 TAXI NETWORK displays in onboarding page and Tavern tab header
tested_features_details.back_buttons: Present on steps 2 (BACK TO ROLES), 3, 4, 5 (BACK). Not present on step 1 (role selection) or step 6 (finish)
tested_features_details.comms_segregation: Messages sent in DRIVERS channel do NOT appear in PASSENGERS channel - verified
tested_features_details.referral_buttons: All 4 social buttons (Twitter, WhatsApp, Facebook, Instagram) plus Copy link button present with data-testids
tested_features_details.copy_feedback: Button changes from 'COPY MY UNIQUE INVITE LINK' to 'COPIED!' with green background after click
tested_features_details.voice_note: Voice button with data-testid='voice-note-btn' present in Tavern post creation form
tested_features_details.comms_overlay: All three roles have proper fixed overlay comms panel with z-index above other content
